full_description: Pick up the marked object and flip it front to back.
schema: {A} denotes the object with colored front and back faces, {a} denotes the arm used to flip it
preference: Mention flipping the object's front and back faces. Keep instructions concise.
seen: Use {a} to pick up {A} and flip it front to back.
Grab {A} with {a}, then turn its front face backward.
Lift {A} and flip its front and back sides.
Pick up {A} and reverse its front-back orientation.
Use {a} to grasp {A} and flip it over front to back.
unseen: Flip {A} front to back after picking it up.
Turn {A} so its front side faces backward.
Grab {A} and reverse its front-back direction.

seen: find {A}, grasp it with {a}, and flip it front to back
